channel.title: JaminZhou Updates
channel.description: Updates from JaminZhou, including the personal homepage and Rouse for macOS.

item.title: JaminZhou | Independent Software Studio
item.description: Independent developer building thoughtful apps for Apple platforms including Rouse for macOS.

item.title: Rouse for macOS
item.description: Rouse is a calm Mac utility for keeping your Mac awake with menu bar controls, a dashboard, battery-aware rules, timed sessions, display sleep control, and the official rouse CLI.

item.title: Rouse Changelog
item.description: Release notes and version history for Rouse.

item.title: Rouse Support
item.description: Support resources, command line setup notes, FAQs, and contact options for Rouse.

item.title: Rouse Privacy Policy
item.description: Privacy details for Rouse on macOS, including local preferences and command line communication.
